# /research

## Purpose
Create or verify research evidence before PRD or Epic authoring.

## When To Use
Requirement phase before defining specs or implementation issues.

## Required Contracts
- `research-before-spec` - Research artifact exists before PRD/Epic creation (`framework/scripts/gates/validate_research_contract.py`)
